data.short_description: Go Greek Yogurt is planning a new location at the Sundial redevelopment near the St. Petersburg Pier. The fast-casual concept features fresh and frozen Greek yogurt with sweet and savory options including yogurt bowls and a self-serve frozen yogurt bar. This will be the ownership's first restaurant under the brand.

Crisp Kitchen & Cocktails has reopened at a new space in Brevard Courtyard, roughly 100 feet from its original Latta Arcade location, with lunch service beginning March 5. The new space offers a larger footprint with a main-level bar and upstairs dining area. Dinner and cocktail service, including a Japanese highball machine, is expected to launch in early April.

Gold Crest Distillery is a new craft distillery and tasting room concept targeting a June opening in Orlando. The approximately 8,000-square-foot space will include guided distillery tours, a copper still, and vodka tastings with no restaurant component. The concept is positioned to serve guests around major downtown events near the Kia Center and Exploria Stadium.

data.status: targeting a late May to early June opening
data.short_description: Pataaka is a new modern Indian restaurant from Anish Nair targeting a late May to early June opening in Midtown Atlanta. The upscale space will feature approximately 113 seats, a mezzanine for private dining, and a 14-seat bar, serving lunch, happy hour, and dinner seven days a week. The menu focuses on small plates and shareable dishes drawing from regional Indian flavors in a contemporary format.

data.location: 290 Nicholas Pkwy NW Unit 5, Cape Coral, FL 33991
data.short_description: Sazon To Go is a fast-casual Latin bowl concept focused on takeout and delivery with limited seating in Cape Coral. The menu features customizable bowls with proteins like chicken, salmon, steak, and lamb, plus sides like plantains. Owner Naylin Zamora operates the concept daily from 11 a.m. to 10 p.m.

Burrito Shak is a fast-casual coastal Mexican concept with about 45 seats and a build-your-own service line planned for Cape Coral. The menu includes burritos, bowls, tacos, quesadillas, and nachos with proteins such as chicken, steak, ground beef, and locally sourced shrimp. The family- and veteran-owned restaurant is operated by Antoinette, Phil, and Vito Basso.

data.location: 122 Chiquita Blvd. S, Unit 3, Cape Coral, FL 33991
data.short_description: The Dominican Experience is a fast-casual Dominican restaurant with a service line setup and about 24 indoor seats, offering breakfast, lunch, and dinner. The menu features traditional dishes such as mangú, pollo guisado, mofongo, and rice and beans. The concept is led by owner Arthur Sanchez with Chef Arlene Ovalles.

data.location: 1189 SW Pine Island Rd., Cape Coral, FL 33991
data.status: Targeting late May or early June opening
data.short_description: Coffee Rush is a dual-lane drive-thru coffee concept with walk-up windows and limited outdoor seating planned for Cape Coral. The menu includes custom coffee drinks, white chocolate mochas, caramel drinks, breakfast sandwiches, and baked goods. Further details were available via the full article link.

Crawfish & Crab Bayou is a Cajun seafood restaurant and market with 60–70 seats in Ellenton. The menu features crawfish boils, blue crabs, oysters, po' boys, and gumbo. The concept is operated by Tim Le and is closed on Tuesdays.

Mister O1 Extraordinary Pizza is a Roman-style pizza concept with approximately 50 seats and full service targeting a June 23 opening in Bradenton. The menu features 72-hour fermented dough pizzas, star-shaped pies with ricotta, burrata boards, and desserts. The location is led by Karif Cohen and was founded by Renato Viola.

Merci Cafe is a French bakery and brunch café with approximately 50 seats opening soon in Bradenton. The menu includes croque monsieur, quiche, onion soup, croissants, and baguette sandwiches, served daily from 8 a.m. to 2:30 p.m. The concept is run by Fanette and Patrick Maquet.

Lazy Goat is a to-go barbecue concept evolving from a food truck, coming soon to Bradenton. The menu highlights include brisket, ribs, meatloaf, baked beans, and cobblers, served Tuesday through Sunday until sold out. The concept is led by Candis Haney and pitmaster Michael Wheeler.

data.location: 6813 Buffalo Rd., Unit 103, Palmetto, FL (zip code not specified)
data.short_description: Jasmine Dragon is a fast-casual boba tea shop with grab-and-go service opening soon in Palmetto. The menu features milk teas, fruit teas, smoothies, brown sugar boba, and dalgona coffee. No ownership details were provided in the article excerpt.

Delancey Tavern is a supper club-style dining venue with a vintage-inspired design and mezzanine lounge, now open in Durham. The menu features contemporary American dishes including steaks, pork chops, short ribs, and house-made desserts. The concept is led by Malachy Noone with partners Kyle Miller and Frederick Hancock.

Woody's BBQ is a 2,700 sq ft restaurant with approximately 66 seats and hybrid counter/table service opening soon in Durham, marking the brand's first North Carolina location. The menu features brisket, pulled pork, spare ribs, smoked chicken, and Carolina vinegar-style barbecue. The location is led by Abby Haywood and Evangeline Smith.

Red Phone Booth is a speakeasy-style bourbon bar and cigar lounge with a hidden entrance and upscale interior, targeting a May opening in Durham. The menu will include bourbon-focused cocktails, Neapolitan pizza, and small plates. The concept is led by Ralph Mensah and Michael Thomas.

Echo + Page is a combined coffee shop, bookstore, and vinyl concept with rotating curated inventory and a workspace vibe opening soon in Durham. The concept features a coffee program alongside curated books and records with a local focus, with planned daily hours of 8 a.m. to 4 p.m. The business is owned by Jermaine Bantum.

East of Texas is a new restaurant concept targeting a summer opening in Durham, currently in the early construction phase. Further menu and concept details were not included in the provided article excerpt. The address and summer timeline were confirmed.

data.location: 6290 N Atlantic Ave, Cape Canaveral, FL 32920
data.short_description: Good Neighbor Cafe is a cozy, beach-inspired café with indoor seating and a patio near the cruise port in Cape Canaveral, targeting a June 1 opening. The menu highlights espresso drinks, baked goods, and the Dawn Patrol Latte, with planned hours of 8 a.m. to 4 p.m., closed Wednesdays. The concept is led by Sofia Ross and Brayden Montgomery.

data.location: 4285 N Atlantic Ave, Cocoa Beach, FL 32931
data.short_description: Magic Smoothies is a fast-casual smoothie shop connected to neighboring concepts, targeting an April 1 opening in Cocoa Beach. The menu features no-ice smoothies, fresh juices, and açaí bowls with final hours to be determined. The concept is owned by Ron Abeles.

data.location: 174 Canaveral Plaza Blvd., Cocoa Beach, FL 32931
data.short_description: Surfin Cow is a family-run coffee and ice cream shop with counter service now open in Cocoa Beach. The menu includes ice cream, shakes, Italian sodas, and specialty coffee, with planned hours Monday through Saturday around 8 a.m. to 6/7 p.m. The concept is owned by Alyssa and Travis Froland.

data.location: 820 E New Haven Ave, Suite 3, Melbourne, FL 32901
data.short_description: The Teahouse is a hybrid tea service concept with Victorian and boho design, now open in Melbourne. The menu includes loose leaf teas, sandwiches, soups, and baked goods, with hours Wednesday through Sunday. The business is owned by Noah Nace.

Cape Side Brewing is a new brewery targeting an April 1 opening in Southport, NC. The concept is led by co-owners Alan A. McDonald, Kevin J. Wright, and Kevin Bower. Further details are available in the full article.

data.status: set to open with a soft opening weekend beginning April 3rd
data.short_description: Cabana Cafe is a new community-focused cafe and market from owner Leslie Allred, with a soft opening weekend beginning April 3 in Beaufort, NC. Final inventory and product deliveries are underway ahead of opening. Further details are available in the full article.

Spicy Pickle is targeting a May opening in Winston-Salem as a casual deli and market option near Bailey Park. Owner Brandon Brock is behind the concept, which will offer a counter-service Italian deli experience. Further details are available in the full article.

data.status: targeting an opening in the coming months
data.short_description: TSUKIMI Ramen + Noodles is targeting an opening in the coming months in Winston-Salem, owned by husband-and-wife team Chong Li and Jessica Zhao. Further details are available in the full article.

data.status: targeting an opening in the first week of April
data.short_description: The Wood Plank Steakhouse is targeting an opening in the first week of April in Farmville, NC, taking over the former Plank Road Steakhouse space. The concept offers a refreshed approach to the previous space. Further details are available in the full article.

Aqua Vitae is a new luxury cocktail lounge from owners Kenny Patel and Maulik Parikh, preparing to open in Apex, NC. The concept focuses on craft cocktails, mocktails, beer, and wine in a high-end setting. Further details are available in the full article.

data.location: 7808 Rea Rd Suite E, Charlotte, NC 28277
data.short_description: Palm Berries, an açaí bowl and smoothie concept, is preparing to open a new Ballantyne-area location in Charlotte targeting approximately six to seven weeks out as construction progresses. The fast-casual café specializes in customizable açaí bowls, which make up about 75% of sales, along with smoothies. The brand currently has 13 locations open and plans to scale to over 100 locations through corporate and franchise growth.

data.location: 2960 Ball Ground/Canton Hwy, Ball Ground, GA 30107
data.short_description: Cheez'd and Confuzed is opening in a stationary permanent location in Ball Ground, GA, after years of mobile service. The concept will operate from a 1964 Shasta Airflyte camper converted into a food truck, supported by an onsite commissary kitchen, serving indulgent cheesy sandwiches. Service is planned 5–6 days a week with lunch from 11 a.m. to 3 p.m., with breakfast and dinner to follow.

data.location: 2960 Ball Ground/Canton Hwy, Ball Ground, GA 30107
data.short_description: Empire Steak South is a new food truck brand launching alongside Cheez'd and Confuzed at the same Ball Ground location, focused on steak and frites. The menu will primarily feature hanger steaks over fries with sauces including chimichurri. Owner Daniel Ray is expanding his mobile food lineup with this new concept.

data.location: 2110 Powers Ferry Rd Suite 120, Atlanta, GA 30339
data.short_description: Big Fat Vegan is a vegan concept from mother-daughter team Tanetta Ellzey and Iyonna Poags, marking the brand's first permanent location after two to three years as a food truck and pop-up. The new space will seat up to 54 guests with dine-in and outdoor patio service, open Monday through Saturday for lunch and dinner. The menu includes fan favorites from the food truck alongside new items such as chicken and waffles and jerk Rasta pasta.

data.location: 6745 Land O' Lakes Blvd, Land O' Lakes, FL 34638
data.short_description: Cotee River Creamery and Desserts is a compact dessert shop with limited indoor and additional outdoor seating, targeting an opening soon in Land O' Lakes. The menu features approximately 60 homemade ice cream flavors daily along with cookies, brownies, cake pops, and custom ice cream cakes. The concept is owned by Michelle Sorensen and George Stacy.

data.location: 8528 Ridge Rd, New Port Richey, FL 34654
data.short_description: 5PM Moments is a takeout-focused Asian fusion concept with limited dine-in seating for about 20 to 30 guests and a drive-thru pickup lane for online orders in New Port Richey. The menu features bento-style meals with proteins like chicken, shrimp, and beef, plus ramen, noodle dishes, wings, and seasonal selections. The concept is owned by Yunzhong Chen, who brings over 15 years of restaurant experience.

data.location: 6130 Massachusetts Ave., New Port Richey, FL 34653
data.short_description: Espresso Gallery and Cafe is a fast-casual coffee shop designed as a comfortable gathering space for reading, working, and socializing, now open in New Port Richey. The space features approximately 15 indoor seats and roughly 25 outdoor seats in a landscaped garden setting. Menu details were partially cut off in the provided article text.

Bungalow Bagels is a small fast-casual bagel shop near the south end of Siesta Key, opening soon in Sarasota. The menu features fresh daily New York-style bagels with house-made cream cheeses, salmon toppings, espresso drinks, and canned-to-order cold brew, planned daily from 7 a.m. to 3 p.m. The concept is led by restaurateur Robert DeSilvio, who also operates Casa Masa locations.

Hob Nob Drive In is a revival of a nostalgic Sarasota drive-in concept with counter ordering and kiosks, offering dine-in, takeout, delivery, and catering. The menu features classic burgers, fries, onion rings, and milkshakes designed to stay affordable, targeting daily 11 a.m. openings with evening closings around 7–8 p.m. The concept is majority owned by Troy King with partner Dimitris Syros.

Hanami Japanese Fine Dining & Lounge is a full-service Japanese restaurant paired with a cocktail lounge inside a restored historic building in Sarasota's Rosemary District. Initial seating is planned for approximately 135 guests with future expansions planned, offering vegan sushi, tableside hibachi, and filet-focused steak options. The concept is owned by Samuel Ray with partners Jeffrey Karasawa and Jason Klamson.

Treehouse Flowers, Coffee & Wine is listed as an upcoming opening in Sarasota; however, the article text was truncated and no address, status, or further details were provided in the supplied excerpt.

Patrick and Leah Pendergast are targeting a June opening for a new Potbelly Sandwich Works on Beach Boulevard in Jacksonville, their second location in the market. The restaurant will have about 20 indoor seats plus patio tables and serve the brand's full menu of toasted subs, milkshakes, soups, salads, and fresh-baked cookies. This location is part of a larger plan for seven Potbelly locations in Northeast Florida.

The Pendergasts' first Potbelly Sandwich Works in Jacksonville is set to debut in April on Old Baymeadows Road. The location is part of the same Northeast Florida expansion plan targeting seven Potbelly locations in the region. Full menu details mirror the Beach Boulevard location description in the same article.

data.event_date: Soft opening Thursday; grand opening March 30
data.status: planning a soft opening Thursday, followed by a grand opening celebration on the 30th
data.short_description: Soul Food Flavor is a new soul food restaurant from Bobby and Christy Pressley, formerly focused on catering, planning a soft opening followed by a grand opening on the 30th in Whitesburg, GA. The menu covers breakfast items and hearty plate lunches and dinners including meatloaf, barbecue chicken, brisket, and turkey wings. Further details are in the full article.

data.location: 15 Thomas Grace Annex Ln #200, Sharpsburg, GA 30277
data.status: targeting a summer opening pending permits and licenses
data.short_description: Frida's Grill and Bar is planning a second location in Sharpsburg, GA, with owner Teodoro Reyes Llamas targeting a summer opening pending permits and licenses. The new location is expected to replicate the Fayetteville concept with full-service dining, a full bar, and entertainment. Further details are in the full article.

data.location: 11105 State Bridge Rd Ste 360, Johns Creek, GA 30022
data.status: fully built out and awaiting final city approvals
data.short_description: Fat Shack is working toward an opening in Johns Creek, GA, with the restaurant fully built out and awaiting final city approvals. The concept is known for its late-night, indulgent menu centered around sandwiches, sides, and comfort food. The Johns Creek location will mirror the existing menu at other Fat Shack locations.

data.location: 423 East 36th Street Unit A, Charlotte, NC 28205
data.event_date: Soft opened March 13; grand opening March 28
data.status: Soft opened March 13; grand opening planned for March 28
data.short_description: Fenian's Keep Irish Pub is a neighborhood Irish-inspired pub with a shotgun-style bar layout that soft opened March 13 and planned its grand opening for March 28 in Charlotte. The concept is drinks only at launch, with sports on TV and future live music planned. The pub is owned by Kyle Musumeci of Brigid's Irish Pub.

data.location: 9211 N. Tryon St STE-5, Charlotte, NC 28262
data.status: Targeting an April or May opening; second Charlotte location
data.short_description: 1368 Sweet Corner Cafe is targeting an April or May opening in the University Area of Charlotte as its second Charlotte location. The casual counter-service café offers Vietnamese street food, boba tea, coffee, and desserts including mochi donuts, mirroring the original shop. The concept is owned by Crystal Nguyen.

data.location: 214 N Tryon St Plaza Suite 1, Charlotte, NC 28202
data.status: Targeting an April opening pending construction progress
data.short_description: Mad Dash Kitchen is a fast-casual sandwich concept targeting an April opening in Uptown Charlotte, marking the brand's first standalone brick-and-mortar. The menu features hot and cold sandwiches, burgers, wraps, soups, salads, and the signature Dasher Chicken Sandwich, with hours Monday through Saturday. The concept is led by Chef Corey Jones.

data.event_date: Soft opening Thursday; grand opening celebration on the 30th
data.status: planning a soft opening Thursday, followed by a grand opening celebration and blessing scheduled for the 30th
data.short_description: Soul Food Flavor is a soul food restaurant from Bobby and Christy Pressley planning a soft opening followed by a grand opening blessing on the 30th in Whitesburg, GA. The menu covers breakfast items such as biscuits and grit bowls, plus comfort food plates including meatloaf, barbecue chicken, brisket, turkey wings, and baked chicken, with rotating Friday and Saturday specials. The restaurant will operate Monday through Saturday across breakfast, lunch, and dinner.

data.location: 15 Thomas Grace Annex Ln #200, Sharpsburg, GA 30277
data.status: targeting a summer opening pending permits and licenses
data.short_description: Frida's Grill and Bar is planning a second location in Sharpsburg, GA, with owner Teodoro Reyes Llamas targeting a summer opening pending permits and licenses. The new restaurant is expected to replicate the Fayetteville concept with full-service dining, a full bar, entertainment, and drinks. Growth was driven by sustained high demand at the existing Fayetteville location, sometimes resulting in 3-hour Saturday waits.

Spicy Pickle is targeting a May opening in Winston-Salem near Bailey Park as a counter-service Italian deli and market spanning approximately 1,800 square feet. The menu includes hot and cold sandwiches, deli salads, desserts, grab-and-go meals, and beer and wine, operating daily from 11 a.m. to 7 p.m. Owner Brandon Brock previously operated Sage & Salt Bistro and Tuscany by Sage & Salt.

Craft brewery led by three partners featuring on-site brewed beer, a 2,000 sq ft indoor space, outdoor beer garden with live music stage, and food truck accommodations. Concept has been in development since 2019.

data.status: Targeting spring 2026 opening with soft openings expected in April
data.short_description: A 9,000 sq ft lakehouse-style gathering space for ~200 guests with RFID self-pour tap walls, QR ordering, and traditional table service. Comfort-focused menu with 56 taps plus coffee cocktails.
Slider concept operating from a bright orange shipping-container "can" with patio seating. Streamlined menu of cheeseburger sliders, waffle fries, and shakes.
Specialty grocery store with counter-service cafe and full bar, including a private dining room. Features house-made foods, gluten-free options, local meats and produce.

data.location: 3599 Atlanta Rd SE Suite 7, Smyrna, GA 30080

data.short_description: Charcuterie board concept in final inspection phase before opening. Article text is truncated and no further details are available from the provided text.

data.status: Planned to open in late March 2026
data.short_description: Father-daughter owned cafe offering counter service with dine-in and takeout, seating for 18 guests, and a menu of coffee drinks, breakfast and lunch items. Sources coffee beans and baked goods from local vendors.
Sushi and Laotian fusion concept from an owner with 10+ years of sushi experience. Fills a gap in the local Alachua dining scene.

data.location: 1975 South Ocean Drive, Hallandale Beach, FL 33009
data.short_description: The brand's 18th location bringing Italian-American cuisine to the Hemispheres Condominium community. Full-service dining with indoor waterfront seating, brunch, happy hour, and specialty menu events.

data.short_description: Authentic Indian restaurant filling a gap in Citrus County where no other Indian food options currently exist. Owner Jeffrey Singh confirmed details to Business Debut.

data.location: 470 Marina Drive, Port St. Joe, FL 32456
data.short_description: Family-friendly seafood restaurant located directly at the city marina, owned by a sixth-generation Port St. Joe native. Concept is designed for an approachable waterfront experience.

data.location: 1975 South Ocean Drive, Hallandale Beach, FL 33009
data.short_description: Italian-American restaurant marking the brand's 18th location, expanding from New York roots. Offers lunch, dinner, weekend brunch, specialty events, and housemade pastas; official opening date not yet announced.

data.short_description: Portuguese-inspired specialty coffee cafe with ~30 seats offering Portuguese desserts, sandwiches, salads, and signature drinks. Coffee imported from Portugal; all food prepared in-house with no fryer oil.

data.location: 3333 South Orange Avenue, Suite 105, Orlando, FL 32806
data.short_description: Family-owned Thai restaurant with 32 seats built around recipes passed down through the owner's wife's family in Thailand. Casual street food atmosphere with full-service dining.

data.location: 11204 E M.L.K JR BLVD, Seffner, FL 33584
data.short_description: Southern comfort food restaurant with seating for 68 guests debuting with a community soft opening featuring free food and family activities. Family-operated concept focused on homestyle cooking.

Viral dessert and arcade franchise concept featuring the signature SMASHED donut with ice cream, Yo Clawz claw machine arcade, breakfast sandwiches, milkshakes, and coffee. First South Florida franchisee will also serve as area developer.

data.short_description: Quick-service cookie shop with open kitchen, service window, outdoor seating, and a rotating monthly menu by a classically trained French cuisine chef. Has franchise locations in Florida, Northeast, and internationally.

Casual full-service restaurant reopening after a two-year closure due to building renovations on a nearly 100-year-old structure. Menu focuses on burgers, sandwiches, and salads with scratch-made items and locally sourced Florida ingredients.

Fast-casual barbecue with drive-thru and ~12 indoor seats in a former BBQ space, featuring pit-cooked chicken, ribs, and classic sides. Owner has 40 years of restaurant experience and previously operated multiple Big Jake's locations.

House-made ice cream shop producing ice cream on-site in a 1,200 sq ft space with seating for 12. Menu includes sundaes, floats, waffle cones, milkshakes, and Finnish specialty products reflecting the owners' heritage.
